qqemo_034.note: Finger pressed to lips, shushing gesture. faceId 33 嘘. emoji 🤫.

qqemo_035.note: Spiral swirl eyes, dizzy. faceId 34 晕. Part of consecutive run 34-39 (035-040). emoji 😵.

qqemo_036.note: Face screwed up grimacing in agony with hands appearing, tormented. faceId 35 折磨. Sits between 晕(035) and 衰(037). emoji 😖.

qqemo_037.note: Dark gray downcast round face with white eyes + cowlick sprout, mouth in dismayed O. classic QQ 衰 faceId 36; directly precedes the skull(038). emoji 🤡 in json is wrong.

qqemo_038.note: White skull, 2-frame static. faceId 37 骷髅. emoji 💀.

qqemo_039.note: Wooden mallet hits the head, tears spurt. faceId 38 敲打. emoji 🔨.

qqemo_040.note: Smiling face waving one hand goodbye. faceId 39 再见. emoji 👋. Completes run 34-39.

qqemo_041.note: Droopy tired eyes; a big sweat bead appears and the hand wipes it. faceId 97 擦汗 (wiping, not bare cold-sweat). Begins run 97-101. emoji 😓.

qqemo_042.note: Eyes shut, finger up to the nose picking/digging nose. faceId 98 抠鼻. emoji 😒 in json is loose.

qqemo_043.note: Eyes shut, two hands clapping below the face. faceId 99 鼓掌. emoji 👏.

qqemo_044.note: Wide eyes, small puckered 3/ε mouth, blush, cold sweat + tear = mortified. faceId 100 糗大了. emoji 😶‍🌫️.

qqemo_045.note: Big toothy sly grin with rosy cheeks, mischievous. faceId 101 坏笑. Ends run 97-101. emoji 🤓 loose.

qqemo_048.note: Wide yawn, hand near mouth, sleepy. faceId 104 哈欠. emoji 🥱.

qqemo_049.note: Displeased frowning face with a thumbs-DOWN gesture, contempt. faceId 105 鄙视 (immediately after 哈欠 104). emoji 🖕 in json is wrong — it is a thumbs-down.

qqemo_050.note: Sad raised inner brows, small pout, hands clasped before mouth, aggrieved. faceId 106 委屈. Begins run 106-111. emoji 😔.

qqemo_051.note: Big watery teary eyes, frown, on the verge of crying. faceId 107 快哭了. emoji 🥺.

qqemo_052.note: Narrow-eyed sly sinister smirk. faceId 108 阴险. emoji 😈 loose.

qqemo_053.note: ANCHOR (user-verified). Puckered 3-shaped kiss lips leaning left, blush, eyes shut. faceId 109 亲亲 left side. emoji 😙.

qqemo_054.note: ANCHOR (user-verified). Mirror of 053, kiss lips puckered to the right (reversed ε). mirror=right.

qqemo_055.note: Wide shocked eyes, sweat beads, startled/scared. faceId 110 吓 (after 亲亲 pair 109). emoji 😯.

qqemo_056.note: Huge glittery pleading puppy eyes, hands together, pitiful. faceId 111 可怜. Ends run 106-111. emoji 🥺.

qqemo_058.note: Laughing hard with streaming tears of joy, mouth wide. faceId 182 笑哭. emoji 😂.

qqemo_062.note: Props chin on one hand, eyes glancing sideways, bored neutral mouth. faceId 212 托腮 (chin-on-hand). Distinct from 061's two-hand cheek-cupping.

qqemo_064.note: Eyes drift up/sideways with a closed-mouth smug smirk, doge-style. faceId 178 斜眼笑. emoji 😏 confirms.

qqemo_065.note: 眼半闭、嘴/鼻喷出红色血液(💦 emoji 实为喷血特效)。对应 faceId 177 喷血。

qqemo_067.note: 用户锚点 067=我最美;图像为双手捧脸、张嘴、脸红,确为 faceId 183 我最美。

qqemo_068.note: 用户锚点 068=脑阔疼(faceId 262);068-073 为连续 faceId 262-267 run。

qqemo_069.note: 用户锚点 069=沧桑(faceId 263);图像为手托腮、若有所思的沧桑脸。

qqemo_070.note: 用户锚点 070=捂脸(faceId 264);图像为单手捂脸、笑/无奈。

qqemo_074.note: 闭眼、手托下巴、头顶冒‘???’问号;紧接 073(267) 的连续 run,对应 faceId 268 问号脸。

qqemo_075.note: 从墙/门边探头、露半只眼偷看;run 续接 faceId 269 暗中观察。

qqemo_076.note: 扬眉、脸红、平嘴的不置可否脸;run 续接 faceId 270 emm(原判微笑/嫌弃为错,run 修正为 emm)。

qqemo_083.note: 手抬到额前敬礼、带点坏笑(🫡);对应 faceId 282 敬礼。

qqemo_084.note: 头后仰、眯眼、大张嘴爆笑;对应 faceId 283 狂笑(经典仰头大笑)。

qqemo_085.note: 空白脸,中段闪现彩色电视雪花/信号条特效;最接近 faceId 284 面无表情,但可能是不在词表内的‘信号/裂开’特效表情。

qqemo_086.note: 双手抱一条蓝鱼(🐟);对应 faceId 285 摸鱼。与 087 同朝向、仅鱼色不同,非镜像。

qqemo_088.note: 从小点脸瞬间爆成超大龇牙大眼的夸张坏笑(😈);对应 faceId 286 魔鬼笑。

qqemo_089.note: 用户锚点 089=哦;图像为端茶杯、半眯眼的高冷脸(faceId 287 哦)。

qqemo_091.note: 侧倾、大亮眼、双手搓在一起的急切坏笑脸;最贴 faceId 294 期待(也可能是撩一撩/坏笑)。

qqemo_098.note: Orange big-cat face with mane/spots and fierce look; emoji=🐆 (leopard). CNY pun emote 豹富 (faceId 336). Paired thematically with 105 tiger.

qqemo_105.note: Tiger face with stripes/mask markings and white snout; emoji=🐯. Year-of-tiger emote 虎虎生威 (faceId 334).

qqemo_106.note: Fluffy white rabbit-shaped figure with black oval eyes/ears making a gesture; emoji=🐰. Year-of-rabbit CNY emote 大展宏兔 (faceId 347).

qqemo_109.note: Animal-eared festive face hugging and nuzzling a red envelope/红包 lovingly with hearts, eyes closed happy. emoji=🧧. 拿到红包(295).

qqemo_113.note: Green dog/shiba face with floppy ears; emoji=🥬 (cabbage). Veggie-dog pun emote 菜狗 (faceId 317).

qqemo_116.note: Face wearing a party hat, eyes shut, blowing a pink party-horn/noisemaker. Celebrate = 庆祝(320). emoji=🎉.

qqemo_120.note: Face holding a pink lotus blossom in cupped hands, blushing. Classic QQ 祈祷(145) is the lotus-prayer face. emoji=🌷. Alt: 送花(205).

qqemo_122.note: Face peeking around a wall/door, waving, with 'Hi' text. Say-hi = 打招呼(341). emoji=👋.

qqemo_128.note: Deadpan blank face being poked/pointed at by a small hand from the lower-left, face turns slightly. emoji=👉. Poke/point gesture — no clean faceId match in the list; closest concept 戳/点. Could pair as a mirror but only one side seen.

qqemo_129.note: Smiling yellow/orange sun with happy face. emoji 🌞. faceId 74 太阳.

qqemo_130.note: Crescent moon with stars on blue night bg. emoji 🌙. faceId 75 月亮.

qqemo_138.note: Green-shirt yellow figure standing with blank dotted-eyes face, arms held out slightly, gently swaying. emoji 🤗 (open-arms hug). faceId 49 拥抱; alt 激动 (130) if read as trembling.

qqemo_139.note: Red heart pulsing/beating. emoji ❤️. faceId 66 爱心.

qqemo_140.note: Upright fresh red rose. emoji 🌹. faceId 63 玫瑰.

qqemo_141.note: Wilting red rose, stem bent over, flower drooping. emoji 🥀. faceId 64 凋谢.

qqemo_142.note: White Boo-style ghost with eyes and little arms, bobbing. emoji 👻. faceId 187 幽灵.

qqemo_143.note: Brown/orange throbbing crossed veins (anger-vein symbol). emoji 💢. faceId 146 爆筋.

qqemo_144.note: Standalone red puckered lips (kiss mark). emoji 💋. faceId 116 示爱 (lips); could be 飞吻 85 but no flying hearts shown.

qqemo_145.note: Red heart cracks and splits in two then reforms. emoji 💔. faceId 67 心碎.

qqemo_146.note: White cup on saucer with brown liquid and rising steam. emoji ☕️. faceId 60 咖啡.

qqemo_147.note: White fluffy alpaca/llama. emoji 🦙. faceId 185 羊驼 (草泥马).

qqemo_148.note: Hand thumbs-up (thumb pointing up, slight tilt). emoji 👍. faceId 76 赞. Distinct from 158 (bear thumbs-up); not a mirror pair.

qqemo_149.note: OK hand: thumb+index form a circle, three fingers up. emoji 👌. faceId 124 好.

qqemo_150.note: Two hands: palm wrapping over a fist = traditional Chinese fist-and-palm salute (作揖). emoji 🤜. faceId 118 抱拳.

qqemo_151.note: Two hands shaking. emoji 🤝. faceId 78 握手.

qqemo_152.note: Hand with curled fingers and extended thumb, beckoning/come-hither motion. emoji ☝️ misleading. faceId 119 勾引.

qqemo_153.note: V / peace / victory sign (two fingers up). emoji ✌️. faceId 79 胜利.

qqemo_154.note: Clenched fist facing forward. emoji ✊. faceId 120 拳头.

qqemo_155.note: Fist with the pinky (little finger) raised up = 'you're lousy/weak'. emoji 🤚 misleading. faceId 121 差劲.

qqemo_160.note: Pink pig face/head. emoji 🐷. Matches user anchor 160=猪头 (faceId 46).

qqemo_161.note: Wide Chinese kitchen cleaver with wooden handle. Official faceId 112 菜刀. Distinct from 162 (long blade).

qqemo_162.note: Long single-edged saber/dagger with red guard. Official faceId 56 刀.

qqemo_163.note: Grey revolver/pistol. Official faceId 169 手枪.

qqemo_164.note: Bowl of green tea in a blue-and-white porcelain bowl. Official faceId 171 茶 (喝茶).

qqemo_165.note: Brown swirl poop with stink/fly marks. Official faceId 59 便便. JSON emoji 💩 matches.

qqemo_167.note: Rainbow swirl lollipop on a stick. Official faceId 147 棒棒糖. JSON 🍭.

qqemo_168.note: Red watermelon slice with seeds. Official faceId 89 西瓜. JSON 🍉.

qqemo_169.note: Orange basketball. Official faceId 114 篮球. JSON 🏀.

qqemo_171.note: Pink layered birthday cake with a lit candle and cherries. Official faceId 53 蛋糕. JSON 🍰.

qqemo_172.note: Red firecrackers bundle. Official faceId 137 鞭炮. JSON 🧨.

qqemo_173.note: Orange radial fireworks burst. Official faceId 333 烟花 (or 310 新年烟花). JSON 🎆.

qqemo_180.note: QQ penguin raises a white handkerchief in its wing and waves it up to its face (waving goodbye / could read as wiping tears). Closest QQ faces 129 挥手 / 39 再见. JSON 👋 supports waving.

qqemo_181.note: QQ penguin facing LEFT blowing a kiss, a red heart floats to its upper right. Blow-kiss = QQ face 85 飞吻 (献吻). JSON 😘. Body/face turned to the left side; no right counterpart in this batch but facing is clearly leftward.

qqemo_182.note: A realistic human hand pointing/extending the index finger toward the RIGHT (skin-tone, not a yellow face). Pointing-right gesture; closest QQ vocab is the 指/戳 pointing gesture (cf 102 right-哼哼 hand style). JSON 👈. Mirror=right by the pointing direction. Uncertain official name.

qqemo_183.note: Yellow QQ face wrapped in a green leaf/cloth like a zongzi, with a red headband — Dragon Boat Festival 粽子 face. Not in the standard faceId list. JSON 🍙. Festival emote, uncertain official name.

qqemo_184.note: Yellow QQ face sitting/wrapped in a pink lotus flower. Festival/Buddhist-lotus face, not in the standard faceId list. JSON 🍙. Uncertain official name (莲花/福气).

qqemo_185.note: Classic green locomotive train (绿皮火车). Object emote, not in standard faceId list. JSON 🚂.

qqemo_186.note: White/red high-speed bullet train (CRH/动车). Object emote, not in standard faceId list. JSON 🚆.

qqemo_189.note: Red festive snake/dragon-like creature with decorations — Year-of-the-Snake festival emote. Not in standard faceId list. JSON 🐍. Distinct from 188.
